title: Keep In Touch With Friends — micro-app idea (July 2025)
html:
TL;DR

  • July 16, 2025 voice-memo-style app idea: a slightly viral, slightly serial app that helps you stay in touch with friends.
  • Mechanic: pick which friends + frequency cadence; app surfaces auto-send suggestions ("Hey, she probably text — Mom or Sam, whoever").
  • Frame: "helps you get rid of that nasty habit of not staying in touch with friends."
  • Pre-Austin move by ~6 weeks — sits in the stealth-apps hopper alongside other small-app ideation.
  • Names Mom and Sam as the example contacts the app would prompt — telling: those are the two relationships Yahir most needs structural help maintaining.

Notes

This is the small-app hopper in action — Yahir pattern-matching on his own friction (not staying in touch) and turning it into a one-liner product spec. The "slightly viral, slightly serial" framing is interesting — he's pre-classifying it as a consumer app archetype before the build even starts.

Notable for the founder loneliness 2022 2026 arc: the example contacts are Mom and Sam — a parent he's about to put 2,090 miles between himself and (cf. July 26 sacrifice journal same week), and his long distance girlfriend. The app-idea is structurally a self-prescribed solution to his own pre-Austin loneliness.

Doesn't appear to have been built — flag for follow-up if Yahir later names it (potential candidate for roster expansion).

Connections

  • · do things that dont scale — the project hopper
  • founder loneliness 2022 2026 — the need this app solves for Yahir himself
  • mom yahir · sam solum — the named example contacts
  • 2025 07 26 thoughtd and things 7 25 2025 · austin move — same-week distance context
  • long distance relationship pattern — the relational backdrop

Privacy

  • No PII or secrets.
